response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks explicit experience in IT architecture design, UML, and client-facing advisory roles, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical gap given the C1 requirement. His background is more engineering-focused than executive leadership.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack engineering and cross-platform experience across multiple languages and environments
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, CI/CD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML expertise, architectural design for enterprise clients, or requirements management
Lacks documented experience in technical project management or executive-level client advisory roles
